clickhouse:
SELECT
    nullIf(nullIf(events.`mat_$pathname`, ''), 'null') AS path,
    countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_0)s), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_1)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_2)s)))) AS pv_cur,
    countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_3)s), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_4)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_5)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_6)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_7)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_8)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_9)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_10)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_11)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_12)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_13)s)))) AS pv_prior,
    countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_14)s), ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_15)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_15)s] : null, %(hogql_val_16)s), %(hogql_val_17)s), 75), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_18)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_19)s)))) AS s75_cur,
    countIf(and(equals(events.event, %(hogql_val_20)s), ifNull(greaterOrEquals(accurateCastOrNull(accurateCastOrNull(has(events.properties_group_custom, %(hogql_val_21)s) ? events.properties_group_custom[%(hogql_val_21)s] : null, %(hogql_val_22)s), %(hogql_val_23)s), 75), 0), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_24)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_25)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_26)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_27)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_28)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_29)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_30)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_31)s)), notEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_32)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_33)s)))) AS s75_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(equals(events.team_id, 275753), has([%(hogql_val_34)s, %(hogql_val_35)s, %(hogql_val_36)s, %(hogql_val_37)s, %(hogql_val_38)s, %(hogql_val_39)s], events.`mat_$pathname`), greaterOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_40)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_41)s)), lessOrEquals(toDate(toTimeZone(events.timestamp, %(hogql_val_42)s)), toDateOrNull(%(hogql_val_43)s)))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    pv_cur DESC
LIMIT 101
OFFSET 0 SETTINGS readonly=2, max_execution_time=10, max_threads=60, allow_experimental_object_type=1, max_ast_elements=4000000, max_expanded_ast_elements=4000000, max_bytes_before_external_group_by=0, enable_analyzer=1, transform_null_in=1, optimize_min_equality_disjunction_chain_length=4294967295, allow_experimental_join_condition=1, use_hive_partitioning=0
hogql:
SELECT
    properties.$pathname AS path,
    countIf(and(equals(event, '$pageview'), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')))) AS pv_cur,
    countIf(and(equals(event, '$pageview'), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))) AS pv_prior,
    countIf(and(equals(event, 'scroll_depth_milestone'), greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 75), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-29')))) AS s75_cur,
    countIf(and(equals(event, 'scroll_depth_milestone'), greaterOrEquals(toFloat(properties.depth_percentage), 75), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-28')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-17')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-19')), notEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-20')))) AS s75_prior
FROM
    events
WHERE
    and(in(properties.$pathname, tuple('/never-hungover/how-to-cure-a-hangover-complete-science-guide', '/never-hungover/how-to-get-rid-of-hangover-fast', '/never-hungover/hangover-headache-fast-relief-methods-2025', '/never-hungover/hangover-nausea-complete-guide-fast-stomach-relief-2025', '/never-hungover/ultimate-dhm-safety-guide-hub-2025', '/never-hungover/complete-hangover-science-hub-2025')), greaterOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-04-15')), lessOrEquals(toDate(timestamp), toDate('2026-05-12')))
GROUP BY
    path
ORDER BY
    pv_cur DESC
LIMIT 101
OFFSET 0
